name: Wingtortoise
desc: When a face-up Fish, Sea Serpent, or Aqua-Type monster(s) you control is banished: You can Special Summon this card from your hand or Graveyard. (The banished monster(s) must be Fish, Sea Serpent, or Aqua-Type even after being banished.)
mnst_eff: When a face-up Fish, Sea Serpent, or Aqua-Type monster(s) you control is banished: You can Special Summon this card from your hand or Graveyard. (The banished monster(s) must be Fish, Sea Serpent, or Aqua-Type even after being banished.)
eff: When a face-up Fish, Sea Serpent, or Aqua-Type monster(s) you control is banished: You can Special Summon this card from your hand or Graveyard. (The banished monster(s) must be Fish, Sea Serpent, or Aqua-Type even after being banished.)

action: Activates if other cards are banished
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
